bio: i want to create a website Named "World Trainer Forum" in which different different trainers will register them selves and built a profile of them by themselves they can edit there profile by there own but they have to take membership , the main purpose of this website is to make the different different trainers available/visible to everyone by just one click , means for example "If I need one Trainer for soft skills training in by company , I will visit this website and search for the trainer I needed and then view his/her details talk to them and book a session for my company." this is what I am thinking to create  , I this I want to type of signup's one as trainer and one as user ,
